summary: Always send `body["private"]` in tickets notes create, even when the flag is the zero value (false), and clarify the flag description.
reason: The generator's 'omit optional bool when its zero-value matches the spec default' idiom interacts badly with Freshservice's server-side default of `private: true` on this endpoint. The CLI default of --private=false matches what a human typing `tickets note <id>` virtually always intends (public reply to the requester), but omitting the field shipped the note as private. Heads-up was caught during live write testing.
validated_outcome: `tickets notes create-ticket <id> --body "…"` (no --private flag) posts a public reply visible to the requester; previously posted as agent-only private.
